description: This figure comprises an optical micrograph of the SPCE sheet steel measurement region before chemical mechanical polishing (CMP) treatment and a schematic of the nano-indentation measurement grid. The left panel shows the grain structure with a superimposed X–Y coordinate system (origin O) for spatial referencing. The right panel illustrates the planned indentation points arranged in a rectangular array with 1 μm unit spacing along both X and Y axes (X=0–2+ and Y=0–2 shown). This micrograph was used to locate grain boundaries and define precise indentation positions for evaluating the microscopic distribution of elastic modulus near grain boundaries after plastic deformation up to 25% true strain. The marked points facilitate correlation between indentation depth profiles and microstructural features, supporting the conclusion that the elastic modulus decreases near grain boundaries due to dislocation pile-up. The figure serves as the pre-CMP reference for subsequent nano-indentation mapping.
